stories.title: Knicks win 10th straight, take command of ECF
stories.summary: The Knicks continued their dominant run through the Eastern Conference playoffs and are one win from the NBA Finals after routing the Cavaliers in Game 3 for their 10th straight win.

stories.title: Kostyuk: Missile struck near parents' Kyiv home
stories.summary: Marta Kostyuk revealed that a missile strike hit just 100 meters from her parents' home in Kyiv, Ukraine, hours before her match at the French Open.

stories.title: Spurs stay up as West Ham relegated from EPL
stories.summary: Tottenham have avoided relegation from the Premier League on the final day of the 2025-26 season.

stories.title: Fernandes claims Premier League assist record
stories.summary: Bruno Fernandes has claimed a record-breaking 21st assist in a Premier League season.

stories.title: Carter halts talk of Giants rift over Dart's polit...
stories.summary: Linebacker Abdul Carter was among Giants players who took to social media to shut down speculation that there was a locker room rift after quarterback Jaxson Dart introduced Donald Trump at a pep rally.
